回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	113學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 當代文藝思潮 (Contemporary Literary Trends)	開課班級 : 應英二年級	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 洪淑敏	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
This class aims to introduce students to discuss the issues of animals in literature.The topic would include the relationship between animals and human beings, and also how humans reflect the living status of every creature, including their own "beings." 


2.教學綱要
--how human treat animals
--what's the differences between human beings and animals
--animals and women
 


3.教科書
1	書名 : 自編　
出版日期 : 年 月 
作者 : 　出版社 : 　版本 :

6.成績評定及課堂要求
1.Midterm Exam 30% 2.Final Exam 30% 3. Class Participation (In cluding attendence and group discussion) 20% 4. Quiz, homework, Presentation 20 % 
1. Your absence in class and delay of homework would cause the deduction of your grade. 
 


8.永續發展目標(SDGs)：SDG4 優質教育
